formula: per level min((human_baseline/our_actions)^2*100,115); replayed source-free solutions split by level-up
note: Source-free solves are AS action-efficient as source-assisted (per-level ~human-capped); the per-game gap (82.7 vs 95.8) is COMPLETENESS not efficiency -- source-free is 11/25 full vs 24/25, so incomplete games score missing levels as 0.
caveat: Scores the executed plan, not the offline search (upper bound); offline. Computed with the fixed empty-frame sandbox wrapper.
